calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants All persons interested in the matter of Sub-Project Area G-2 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site), Sub-Project Area G-3 (Pier 70-28-A-Acre Site) and Sub-Project Area G-4 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site) of City and County of San Francisco Infrastructure Financing District No. 2 (Port of San Francisco), and Appendix G-2 to an Existing Infrastructure Financing Plan and Amendments Thereof, Related to Sub-Project Area G-2 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site), et al.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Robb W. Kapla, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco and City and County of San Francisco Infrastructure Financing Distric No. 2 (Port of San Francisco).
Juan M. Galvan, Esq., a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by any of the above-mentioned defendants.
Plaintiffs' Complaint for Validation was filed on October 26, 2018.
Order for Publication, Posting and Mailing Summons was filed on December 3, 2018.
Proof of Publication was filed on January 25, 2019, which evidences that the Summons was published on December 7, 2018, December 14, 2018 and December 21, 2018.
Default as to the above-mentioned defendants was entered on January 25, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco and City and County of San Francisco Infrastructure Financing Distric No. 2 (Port of San Francisco), and against the defaulted defendants All persons interested in the matter of Sub-Project Area G-2 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site), Area G-3 (Pier 70-28-A-Acre Site) and Sub-Project Area G-4 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site) of City and County of San Francisco Infrastructure Financing District No. 2 (Port of San Francisco), and Appendix G-2 to an Existing Infrastructure Financing Plan and Amendments Thereof, Related to Sub-Project Area G-2 (Pier 70-28-Acre Site) et al., as follows:

***SEE TEXT OF JUDGMENT***

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
